notes: The live publications catalog fixture captures non-empty Publication id/name and opaque cursor behavior for top-level publications.

The root introspection fixture confirms channel, channels, publication, publicationsCount, publishedProductsCount, publicationCreate, publicationUpdate, and publicationDelete exist in Admin GraphQL 2025-01.
Runtime parity is enforced by the publication query-shapes integration test because publication lifecycle replay is a multi-step local staging flow.
